## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential outbound sales and account-based marketing (ABM) strategies for Swoogo, exploring automation and AI-assisted approaches.](https://fathom.video/share/DjFKsUk-jr6Gk27eCR7SGFU39wamHTEz?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Swoogo is in early stages of ABM, focusing on the industrials industry with manual account selection](https://fathom.video/share/DjFKsUk-jr6Gk27eCR7SGFU39wamHTEz?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [Current approach lacks scalability and full ABM implementation (content, messaging, intent signals)](https://fathom.video/share/DjFKsUk-jr6Gk27eCR7SGFU39wamHTEz?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [Opportunities identified for automation in account research, personalization, and trigger-based outreach](https://fathom.video/share/DjFKsUk-jr6Gk27eCR7SGFU39wamHTEz?tab=summary&timestamp=1017.0)
  - [Potential collaboration with Marcel/fwd.digital to develop custom workflows and implement more advanced ABM tactics](https://fathom.video/share/DjFKsUk-jr6Gk27eCR7SGFU39wamHTEz?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)

## Topics

### Current Swoogo Outbound Strategy

  - [Shifted from AE-led to SDR-led outbound efforts](https://fathom.video/share/DjFKsUk-jr6Gk27eCR7SGFU39wamHTEz?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [Manually building targeted account lists (700 contacts across 300 accounts) in industrials industry](https://fathom.video/share/DjFKsUk-jr6Gk27eCR7SGFU39wamHTEz?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
  - [Light marketing touches to broader list](https://fathom.video/share/DjFKsUk-jr6Gk27eCR7SGFU39wamHTEz?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Lacks full ABM implementation (tailored content, messaging for specific industries)](https://fathom.video/share/DjFKsUk-jr6Gk27eCR7SGFU39wamHTEz?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)

### Proposed Improvements and Next Steps

  - [Implement separate domain for outbound to protect main domain reputation](https://fathom.video/share/DjFKsUk-jr6Gk27eCR7SGFU39wamHTEz?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [Explore trigger-based outreach (e.g., pricing page visits)](https://fathom.video/share/DjFKsUk-jr6Gk27eCR7SGFU39wamHTEz?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
  - [Develop systematic approach to prioritize accounts by ICP and intent signals](https://fathom.video/share/DjFKsUk-jr6Gk27eCR7SGFU39wamHTEz?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
  - [Automate account research and personalization using AI-assisted workflows](https://fathom.video/share/DjFKsUk-jr6Gk27eCR7SGFU39wamHTEz?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)
  - [Consider expanding to other industries (e.g., B2B tech) with learnings from current approach](https://fathom.video/share/DjFKsUk-jr6Gk27eCR7SGFU39wamHTEz?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)

### AI-Assisted Outbound Tactics

  - [De-anonymize website visitors for automated first touch (e.g., pricing page visits)](https://fathom.video/share/DjFKsUk-jr6Gk27eCR7SGFU39wamHTEz?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
  - [Scrape company websites and LinkedIn profiles for personalized outreach](https://fathom.video/share/DjFKsUk-jr6Gk27eCR7SGFU39wamHTEz?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)
  - [Augment SDR/AE research tasks with AI-powered workflows](https://fathom.video/share/DjFKsUk-jr6Gk27eCR7SGFU39wamHTEz?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Potential to save significant time in account research and personalization](https://fathom.video/share/DjFKsUk-jr6Gk27eCR7SGFU39wamHTEz?tab=summary&timestamp=1777.0)

### ICP Scoring and Intent Signals

  - [Framework presented for categorizing accounts by fit (good/bad) and intent (high/low)](https://fathom.video/share/DjFKsUk-jr6Gk27eCR7SGFU39wamHTEz?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
  - [Opportunity to refine ICP scoring based on closed-won deals and created opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/DjFKsUk-jr6Gk27eCR7SGFU39wamHTEz?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
  - [Discussion on balancing ICP fit with high intent signals for pipeline generation](https://fathom.video/share/DjFKsUk-jr6Gk27eCR7SGFU39wamHTEz?tab=summary&timestamp=1390.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Swoogo to provide detailed description of current SDR, AE, and intern "jobs to be done" for potential automation](https://fathom.video/share/DjFKsUk-jr6Gk27eCR7SGFU39wamHTEz?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)
  - [Explore setting up a work stream with Marcel/fwd.digital to implement custom workflows (no long-term commitment initially)](https://fathom.video/share/DjFKsUk-jr6Gk27eCR7SGFU39wamHTEz?tab=summary&timestamp=1672.0)
  - [Prioritize quick-win automations that can deliver value within the first few weeks](https://fathom.video/share/DjFKsUk-jr6Gk27eCR7SGFU39wamHTEz?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Consider implementing a basic tool for SDRs/AEs to quickly gather account research from website/LinkedIn URLs](https://fathom.video/share/DjFKsUk-jr6Gk27eCR7SGFU39wamHTEz?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Continue discussions on potential collaboration and next steps for improving Swoogo's outbound strategy](https://fathom.video/share/DjFKsUk-jr6Gk27eCR7SGFU39wamHTEz?tab=summary&timestamp=1823.0)
